/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mcms.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcms.dir/server/tcp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcms.dir/logger/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcms.dir/engine/control_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mcms.dir/simulator/simulator.cpp.o -o mcms  -lpthread
